targets.query:
from(bucket: "k6bucket")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "http_req_duration")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "value")
  |>count()

from(bucket: "k6bucket")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) =>
    r._measurement == "iteration_duration" and
    r._field == "value"
  )
   |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "avg_iteration_duration")

from(bucket: "k6bucket")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "iterations" and r._field == "value")
  |> sum()

from(bucket: "k6bucket")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "iterations" and r._field == "value")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1s, fn: sum)
  |> mean()

from(bucket: "k6bucket")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "http_req_duration")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "value")

from(bucket: "k6bucket")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "http_req_duration" and r._field == "value")
  |> mean()

from(bucket: "k6bucket")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "http_req_duration" and r._field == "value")
  |> max()

names: value {expected_response="true", method="HEAD", name="http://localhost:3333/", proto="HTTP/1.1", scenario="default", status="200"}

targets.query:
from(bucket: "k6bucket")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "http_req_duration")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "value")

from(bucket: "k6bucket")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "http_req_duration")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "value")
  |> quantile(q: 0.95, method: "exact_mean")
  |> group()

from(bucket: "k6bucket")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "http_req_duration")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "value")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._value > 3.20)
  |> group()
  |> count()
